name: Restaurant managers in multi-unit hospitality groups processing 5–15 employee schedules/month tool
description: For restaurant managers in multi-unit hospitality groups processing 5–15 employee schedules/month, inefficient scheduling causes understaffing and overstaffing. We provide a streamlined scheduling app instead of manual scheduling via spreadsheets or paper.
target_audience: Restaurant managers in multi-unit hospitality groups processing 5–15 employee schedules/month
problem_solved: Inefficient employee scheduling leading to understaffing and overstaffing.
